articles.title: Buckley Carlson exits White House role under JD Vance amid Tucker Carlson–Trump tensions
articles.description: Buckley Carlson, son of Tucker Carlson, has resigned as deputy press secretary to Vice President JD Vance amid family tensions with Trump.

articles.title: Day after, opposition hopes it has been able to dent BJP’s invincibility
articles.description: Day after, opposition hopes it has been able to dent BJP’s invincibility

articles.title: ‘India benefited from strong ties’: Iran envoy downplays tanker incident, calls for de-escalation
articles.description: IRGC re-closes the Strait of Hormuz on April 19, 2026, after peace talks fail. Iran’s envoy to India calls for de-escalation despite shooting at Indian ships.

articles.title: BJP will never understand the self-respect of Telangana: Ponnam Prabhakar
articles.description: Ponnam Prabhakar criticizes BJP for undermining Telangana's self-respect and warns against unjust political actions.

articles.title: Iran says US negotiations have progressed but far from final deal
articles.description: Progress had been made in negotiations with the United States to end the war, Iran's parliamentary speaker said on Saturday night, but added the sides were still far from an agreement. "We are still far from the final discussion," Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who is also one of Iran's negotiators, said in a national televised address, adding "we made progress in the negotiations, but there are many gaps and some fundamental points remain". bur/ceg/abs

articles.title: Israel carries out fresh strikes in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
US Blockade To Go Global? Trump's Plan to Break Iran's Strait of Hormuz Grip
articles.description: The US military is planning to expand operations against Iran by seizing oil tankers linked to the country in international waters, amid rising tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: First survivor breaks silence in Amravati sexual abuse case
articles.description: A 15-year-old survivor has come forward in the Amravati sexual exploitation case, prompting police to seek more victims while urging caution against misinformation.

articles.title: Ex-IPS BJP pick threatens to thrash voters
articles.description: Kolkata: Trinamool on Friday lodged a complaint against Rajesh Kumar, the BJP candidate for Jagatdal, for allegedly violating the MCC and threatening .

articles.title: Allahabad high court modifies its own order directing FIR against Rahul Gandhi
articles.description: In a surprising turn of events, the Lucknow bench of the Allahabad High Court has revised its earlier decision regarding an FIR against Rahul Gandhi in a case concerning dual citizenship. Acknowledging the importance of due process, the court has now mandated that the Congress leader be served a notice for a hearing.
